title: Manufacturing Setup and Business Operations Outsourcing in Vietnam
metaDescription: Launch your manufacturing presence in Vietnam with preferential tax rates and specialized locations, including factory inspection, accounting, etc.

hero.title: Manufacturing Setup and Business Operations Outsourcing in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Our manufacturing setup and outsourcing services are designed to optimize processes and reduce operational costs. We provide customized solutions that ensure efficiency, quality control, and scalability, helping businesses enhance their manufacturing capabilities with focus on excellence.

sections.heading: Why Vietnam for Your Manufacturing Company Setup?
body: A preferential corporate income tax rate of 10% for 15 years, applicable to newly established enterprises from investment projects in specific industries:
High technology, scientific research, and technological development
Development of water plants, water supply, and drainage systems
Tax exemption for 2 years and 50% tax reduction for the subsequent 4 years.

sections.heading: A Comprehensive Roadmap to Manufacturing Success in Vietnam
body: A comprehensive roadmap for expanding and operating your manufacturing business in Vietnam is crucial for long-term success. It helps businesses navigate regulatory requirements, optimize supply chains, and establish efficient production systems. By aligning with local labor markets, industry standards, and trade regulations, companies can reduce risks and minimize disruptions. With a strategic plan, businesses can capitalize on Vietnam's growth potential while ensuring scalability and sustainability in the evolving market.

sections.heading: Your Roadmap with InCorp Vietnam
items: Phase 1: Initial consultation on establishment and regulatory frameworks
Phase 3: Setup manufacturing company and full consultation in HR, payroll, and accounting operations
Phase 4: Monthly consultation on legal compliance, HR, accounting, and tax advisory
